product_name: Toy Story Push N Play Vehicles

bullets: Push down to activate fun motion features – no batteries required
Includes Buzz Lightyear, Woody and Jessie character vehicles
Supports early movement, coordination and cause-and-effect play
Easy-to-handle size designed for toddler hands
Bright colours and familiar characters inspire imaginative play
content.keywords: toy story toy cars, toddler car toy, push along toy, buzz lightyear toy, woody toy, jessie toy, preschool vehicle toy, baby push toy
content.description: Ready, set, go! The Toy Story Push N Play Vehicles bring simple, action-packed fun to toddler playtime. Push down to activate unique motion features for each character-inspired vehicle – no batteries required. Featuring Buzz Lightyear, Woody and Jessie, these easy-to-use vehicles are perfectly sized for little hands, encouraging movement, coordination and cause-and-effect learning. Bright colours and familiar Disney-Pixar Toy Story characters inspire imaginative adventures, whether playing at home or on the go. Designed for early learners, this playful set delivers big fun with simple push-and-play action.

attributes.whats_in_box: 9 x Push-along Toys, 9 x Hang Tag Strings, 9 x Hang Tags
attributes.primary_color: Blue, Green, Brown, Red, Black, Skin tone, Yellow, White, Orange, Purple
attributes.assembly_instructions: Assemble the frame by connecting main components with screws, attach additional parts using connectors

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
